description: Agreement in which Aharon b. Shemarya ha-Kohen and Nisim b. Ya'aqov, who bought half a house from Makki b. Abu Sahl for sixty dinars, rent it back to him, for 3 dinars a year, for a period of ten years. If by the end of the contract he gives them back to full price of the original sale (60 dinars) - they will transfer the property back to himl; if not, they are allowed to sale it forward. This is infact a loan with interest - the rent is the interest. Location: Alexandria. Dated: November 3, 1103 CE.
description_he: הסכם. אהרן בן שמריה הכהן ונסים בן יעקב קנו חצי בית, מחכירים חזרה לבעלים תמורת 3 דינרים לשנה לעשר שנים. אלכסנדריה, 3 בנובמבר 1103.
